post.description:
Availability search for specified cabin class, legs and persons. Accepts search modifiers to filter, order and paginate results.

## Search Parameters
- **cabinClass**: refer to enums: FlightCabinClass
- **persons**: counts for adults, children and infants
- **legs**: list of origin, destination and departure date for each leg. Airport IDs can be retrieved via `getAirports` or `searchAutocomplete`.

## Search Modifiers

**Content & Statistics**
- Use `"includeContent": 1` to return all static content related to the result set (airports, carriers, equipments, etc.)
- Use `"includeStatistics": 1` to return statistics related to the result set, useful for building a filtering menu.

**Filtering**

Provide the filter type ID as the key and filtering parameters as the value. Refer to enums: FlightFilterParams.

Example â€” results with carrier 45 or 410:
```json
"filtering": {
  "4": ["45", "410"]
}
```

**Sorting**

- `orderBy` values: refer to enums: FlightSortingParams
- `order` values: `0` = Descending, `1` = Ascending

Example â€” order by rating descending:
```json
"sorting": {
  "orderBy": 1,
  "order": 0
}
```

**Paging**

Example â€” first page with 100 results:
```json
"paging": {
  "page": 1,
  "pageSize": 100
}
```

Receive a single result from a previous search along with a list of applicable booking extras, frequent flyers and meal options, and optionally price it for booking.

Passenger details and selected extras are accepted in this step to produce a pricing estimation of the final booking. The bundle object acts as a container to store the booking selection along with the assigned passengers and extras. The response will contain a detailed breakdown of the price produced from the contents of the bundle.

Price confirmation must be performed before proceeding to a booking by passing the `priceConfirm` flag set to `1`. Price, schedule or baggage changes can happen on this step.

This call expects a result key and either the same search parameters used to get this result or the `searchId` received in the search response. When the `priceConfirm` flag is used even once, the result is considered priced and it can continue to the booking step.

Requires identity info.

## Notes
- `fareType` values: `4` = Published, `5` = Private
- `changeOfPlane` values: `0` = False, `1` = True
- `priceConfirm` flag: set to `1` to confirm pricing before booking
Create a flight booking after pricing has been confirmed via `/flights/getFlight`. Returns a booking with a `reference` to use for issuance.

searchId.description: Search identifier this booking was created from

payableAmount.description: Total amount payable for this booking

confirmed.description: Whether the booking is confirmed (1 = true)

issuable.description: Whether the booking is issuable (1 = true)

paid.description: Whether the booking has been paid (1 = true)

components.description: List of booking components (flights, hotels, etc.)

persons.description: Map of person ID to person details

transactions.description: List of transactions associated with this booking

refundableUntilDate.description: Date until which the booking is refundable (0 if not applicable)

paymentPlan.description: Active payment plan for this booking

retained.description: Whether the component is retained (1 = true)

status.description: Component status (1 = PreBooking, 2 = Pending, 3 = Failed, 4 = Unconfirmed, 5 = Confirmed)

cancellationStatus.description: Cancellation status (1 = None, 2 = Pre-Cancellation, 3 = Pending, 4 = Cancelled)

pricedAt.description: Datetime when the component was priced

warnings.description: List of warnings for this component

errors.description: List of errors for this component

refund.description: Whether a refund has been issued for this component

toDate.description: Arrival datetime of last segment (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)

days.description: Number of days the journey spans

itineraries.description: List of flight itineraries for this component

itineraryType.description: Itinerary type (1 = One Way, 2 = Round Trip)

refundable.description: Whether this itinerary is refundable (1 = true)

ticketTimeLimit.description: Deadline by which tickets must be issued (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)

passengers.description: List of passengers on this itinerary

fees.description: List of pricing fee records for this itinerary

transitVisa.description: Whether a transit visa is required (1 = true)

segments.description: List of flight segments in this leg

cabinClass.description: Cabin class (62 = Economy, 63 = Premium Economy, 64 = Business, 65 = First)

numSectors.description: Number of sectors in this segment

operatingFlightNo.description: Operating flight number (0 if same as marketing)

fares.description: List of fares per passenger type

sectors.description: List of sectors in this segment

ptc.description: Passenger type code (1 = Adult, 2 = Child, 3 = Infant)

operatingFlightNo.description: Operating flight number (0 if same as marketing)

title.description: Passenger title (1 = Mr, 2 = Mrs, 3 = Ms, 4 = Mstr, 5 = Miss)

ticket.description: Ticket number (empty if not yet issued)

remarks.description: List of SSR/remarks for this passenger

properties.description: Remark properties keyed by property ID (e.g. 16 = passport number, 17 = nationality, 18 = expiry date, 19 = issue date)

code.description: Remark code (e.g. DOCS = Advanced Passenger Information)

originalROE.description: Rate of exchange from original to display currency

pricingOutput.description: JSON string containing detailed pricing layer output

currencyId.description: Currency identifier used by this PCC

carrierIds.description: List of carrier IDs restricted to this PCC (null = all carriers)

isHidden.description: Whether this PCC is hidden (1 = true)

title.description: Title (1 = Mr, 2 = Mrs, 3 = Ms, 4 = Mstr, 5 = Miss)

isUser.description: Whether this person is a system user (1 = true)

isAdmin.description: Whether this person is an admin (1 = true)

main.description: Whether this is the main email (1 = true)

active.description: Whether this email is active (1 = true)

type.description: Transaction type (1 = Deposit, 2 = Withdraw, 3 = Payment, 4 = Refund, 5 = Agreement)

mode.description: Payment mode (1 = Bank Transfer, 2 = Cash, 3 = Cheque, 4 = Card, 5 = Wallet, 6 = Card POS, 7 = On Hold)

via.description: Payment gateway (1 = Travel Tank, 2 = SharkPay, 3 = Flutterwave)

status.description: Transaction status (1 = Pending, 2 = Accepted, 3 = Declined, 4 = Failed, 5 = Cancelled)

cancel.description: Flag indicating whether to cancel (1 = cancel, 0 = uncancel)

tickets.description: List of tickets to issue for this component

issuable.description: Flag indicating whether the booking is issuable (1 = true)

pay.description: Flag indicating whether to pay at the time of issuing (1 = true)

BookingContent.description: Reference/lookup data related to the booking

currencies.description: Map of currency ID to currency details

organizations.description: Map of organization ID to organization details

countries.description: Map of country ID to country details

cities.description: Map of city ID to city details

airports.description: Map of airport ID to airport details

carriers.description: Map of carrier ID to carrier details

equipments.description: Map of equipment ID to equipment details

bookingClasses.description: Map of booking class ID to booking class code

symbol.description: Unicode hex code for the currency symbol

template.description: List of template types to filter by (1 = Flights, 2 = Hotels)

status.description: List of booking statuses to filter by (1 = PreBooking, 2 = Pending, 3 = Failed, 4 = Unconfirmed, 5 = Confirmed)

issueStatus.description: List of issue statuses to filter by

cancellationStatus.description: List of cancellation statuses to filter by

reduced.description: Whether to return reduced booking data (1 = true)

GetBrandedFaresResponse.description: Response from getBrandedFares. Mirrors FlightSearchResponse structure but each FlightResult includes emissions and brandedFares.fareRules, each FlightLeg includes a brandedFare, and a baseFlightFare field is added.

flights.description: List of branded fare flight variants for the selected flight

legs.description: List of flight legs, each including a brandedFare object

baseFlightFare.description: Base64 encoded key representing the base (non-branded) flight fare

BDM.text: Reissue minimum Penalty amount with sale currency: 149.00 USD

BDA.text: Reissue before departure is allowed: Allowed with restrictions

RVA.text: Revalidation before departure is allowed: Reval not allowed

fareRules.description: List of fare rule sections as HTML-formatted strings. Each entry represents a distinct rule category (e.g. Application, Penalties, Voluntary Refunds).

items.description: HTML-formatted string containing the text of a single fare rule section.

example:
APPLICATION AND OTHER CONDITIONS
RULE - 023/2015
UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED
ECONOMY CLASS FARES ...

PENALTIES
FOR T- TYPE FARES
CANCELLATIONS
BEFORE DEPARTURE
TICKET IS NON-REFUNDABLE IN CASE OF CANCEL/REFUND. ...

code.description: IATA code (may represent a city or airport group)

popularity.description: Popularity score used for sorting results

GetFrequentFlyerProgramsResponse.description: Map of frequent flyer program ID (as string) to program info

GetMealOptionsResponse.description: Map of meal option ID (as string) to meal option info

GetAirportsResponse.description: Map of airport ID (as string) to airport info

GetCarriersResponse.description: Map of carrier ID (as string) to carrier info

id.description: Cabin class identifier (62 = Economy, 63 = Premium Economy, 64 = Business, 65 = First)

searchId.description: Search identifier this flight belongs to

extras.description: Map of extra ID to extra/ancillary service details

mealOptions.description: List of available meal option IDs for this flight

emissionsGramsPerFlight.description: Total CO2 emissions in grams for the entire flight (all passengers)

partialInfo.description: Whether the emissions data is partial/estimated

status.description: Status of the extra service (1 = active)

name.description: Full name of the extra service

description.description: Full description of the extra service
description.example: Our travel sharks will assist you with any other special service requests.

shortDescription.description: Short description of the extra service

terms.description: Terms and conditions for the extra service

perAdult.description: Whether price is charged per adult (1 = per adult, 0 = flat fee)

perChild.description: Whether price is charged per child (1 = per child, 0 = flat fee)

perInfant.description: Whether price is charged per infant (1 = per infant, 0 = flat fee)

total.description: Computed total price (null if not yet selected)

icon.description: URL of the extra service icon

selected.description: Whether this extra has been selected (null if not selected)

key.description: Base64 encoded key identifying this component

refundable.description: Whether this component is refundable (1 = true)

key.description: Base64 encoded key identifying this sub-component

adminMarkup.description: Admin markup for this sub-component (negative = discount)

refundable.description: Whether this sub-component is refundable (1 = true)

personTypeCounts.description: Number of passengers per type (1 = Adult, 2 = Child, 3 = Infant)

personTypeBasePrices.description: Base price per person type (1 = Adult, 2 = Child, 3 = Infant)

personTypeTaxPrices.description: Tax per person type (1 = Adult, 2 = Child, 3 = Infant)

redeemDate.description: Date by which the booking must be redeemed (YYYY-MM-DD)

installmentFrequency.description: Frequency type (1 = pay later, 2 = weekly, 3 = monthly)

minDaysPaidOffAfterPurchase.description: Minimum days after purchase by which full payment must be made

maxDaysPaidOffAfterPurchase.description: Maximum days after purchase by which full payment must be made

latestPaymentDaysBeforeRedeem.description: Latest number of days before redeem date that final payment must be made

minimumDeposit.description: Minimum deposit as a fraction of total (e.g. 0.4 = 40%)

maximumDeposit.description: Maximum deposit as a fraction of total (e.g. 0.9 = 90%)

depositAmount.description: Computed deposit amount in display currency

planOptions.description: List of available plan options with different installment counts

installmentCount.description: Number of installments in this option

installmentFrequency.description: Frequency of installments (1 = pay later, 2 = weekly, 3 = monthly)

transactions.description: Transactions associated with this plan option

persons.description: Persons associated with this plan option

downpayment.description: Whether this is the downpayment/deposit installment (1 = true)

paidByDate.description: Date by which this installment must be paid (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)

paid.description: Whether this installment has been paid (1 = true)

penaltyId.description: Penalty identifier if payment was late

reminderSent.description: Whether a payment reminder has been sent (1 = true)

GetFlightContent.description: Lookup content referenced by IDs in the flight result

countries.description: Map of country ID to country info

cities.description: Map of city ID to city info

airports.description: Map of airport ID to airport info

carriers.description: Map of carrier ID to carrier info

equipments.description: Map of equipment ID to equipment info

frequentFlyerPrograms.description: Map of frequent flyer program ID to program info

mealOptions.description: Map of meal option ID to meal option info

legs.description: List of flight legs referenced by flight results

segments.description: List of flight segments referenced by legs

sectors.description: List of individual flight sectors (actual departure/arrival details)

fares.description: List of fare types used in this search

key.description: Base64 encoded key identifying this flight result, used in subsequent requests (getFlight, bookFlight, etc.)

origin.description: List of origin airport IDs per leg

destination.description: List of destination airport IDs per leg

originCountry.description: List of origin country IDs per leg

destinationCountry.description: List of destination country IDs per leg

fromDate.description: Departure datetime of the first sector (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)

toDate.description: Arrival datetime of the last sector (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)

days.description: Number of days the journey spans

ticketTimeLimit.description: Deadline by which the ticket must be issued (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)

bookingClass.description: Booking class identifier (references bookingClasses in content)

legs.description: Indices of legs used by this flight result (references the top-level legs array)

best.description: Flag indicating this is the best overall result (1 = true)

cheapest.description: Flag indicating this is the cheapest result (1 = true)

fastest.description: Flag indicating this is the fastest result (1 = true)

basePerPerson.description: Base fare per person type (1 = Adult, 2 = Child, 3 = Infant)

taxPerPerson.description: Tax per person type (1 = Adult, 2 = Child, 3 = Infant)

originalROE.description: Rate of exchange from original currency to display currency

total.description: Total price in display currency (after markups)

fromDate.description: Date from which this cancellation policy applies (null = applies immediately)

basePerPerson.description: Net base fare per person type (1 = Adult, 2 = Child, 3 = Infant)

taxPerPerson.description: Net tax per person type (1 = Adult, 2 = Child, 3 = Infant)

FlightPricingLayers.description: Detailed breakdown of pricing through markup layers

currency.description: Currency identifier used in pricing layers

l2_markups.description: Layer 2 markup entries keyed by rule name

l5_markups.description: Layer 5 markup entries keyed by rule name

final_total.description: Final total price at each pricing layer

FlightPricingLayerDetail.description: Pricing totals at a specific markup layer, broken down by passenger type

numOfElements.description: Number of passengers of this type

base.description: Total base fare for all passengers of this type

tax.description: Total tax for all passengers of this type

name.description: Branded fare name (empty if not applicable)

fareRules.description: Map of passenger type ID (as string) to fare rule categories. Only present in getBrandedFares response.

BrandedFareRulePassengerEntry.description: Map of fare rule category ID (as string) to fare rule category details, plus a passengerType field.

BrandedFareRuleCategory.description: A fare rule category section (e.g. Advance Reservation, Changes/Reissue, Refund).

rules.description: Map of rule code to rule detail. Only present when the category has specific rule entries.

BrandedFareRuleEntry.description: A single fare rule entry identified by a rule code (e.g. BDM, ADX, WAI, BDA).

value.description: The rule value (amount, date string, or descriptive text such as 'Not allowed')

currency.description: Currency code if the value is a monetary amount (e.g. USD). Omitted for non-monetary rules.

text.description: HTML-formatted human-readable description of the rule
text.example: Reissue minimum Penalty amount with sale currency: 149.00 USD

stops.description: Number of stops used in scoring

flightTime.description: Flight time in minutes used in scoring

priceWeight.description: Weight applied to price in score calculation

stopWeight.description: Weight applied to stops in score calculation

flightTimeWeight.description: Weight applied to flight time in score calculation

travelTime.description: Total travel time in minutes for this leg

segments.description: Indices of segments belonging to this leg (references the top-level segments array)

baggageNum.description: Number of baggage pieces included in the fare for this leg

baggageWeight.description: Maximum baggage weight allowance for this leg

baggageUnit.description: Baggage weight unit for this leg

fareBasis.description: Fare basis code for this leg

FlightLegBrandedFare.description: Branded fare detail attached to a leg. Present in getBrandedFares response.

airlineId.description: Airline identifier for this branded fare

services.description: Map of service sub-code to service details

fares.description: Map of fare index to passenger type (0 = Adult, 1 = Child, 2 = Infant)

operatingFlightNo.description: Operating flight number (empty if same as marketing)

bookingClass.description: Booking class identifier (references bookingClasses in content)

bookingCount.description: Number of seats available in this booking class

cabinClass.description: Cabin class identifier (62 = Economy, 63 = Premium Economy, 64 = Business, 65 = First)

equipment.description: Aircraft equipment identifier (references equipments in content)

changeOfPlane.description: Whether a change of plane is required (1 = true)

sectors.description: Indices of sectors belonging to this segment (references the top-level sectors array)

operatingFlightNo.description: Operating flight number (empty if same as marketing)

totalFlightsFiltered.description: Total number of flights after filtering

tripDuration.description: Trip duration buckets with minimum prices

tripDurationFiltered.description: Trip duration buckets with minimum prices (filtered)

baggageAllowances.description: Map of baggage piece count to minimum price

refundability.description: Map of refundability index to refundability info and minimum price

stops.description: Stop count options with minimum prices

carriers.description: Map of carrier ID to minimum price

equipments.description: Map of equipment ID to minimum price

minPrice.description: Minimum price for flights with this duration
Minimum price for this filter option

refundable.description: Whether flights in this group are refundable

minPrice.description: Minimum price for flights in this refundability group
Minimum price for flights with this number of stops

facilities.description: Map of facility ID to facility attributes

image.description: Relative path to the hotel image

FacilityAttributes.description: Attributes of a facility. Properties vary by facility type.

indFee.description: Fee indicator (1 = has fee, 0 = no fee)

number.description: Numeric value associated with the facility

poiName.description: Name of the point of interest

originalAmount.description: Original price amount in original currency

fromDate.description: Date from which cancellation policy applies

PricingLayers.description: Detailed breakdown of pricing through markup layers

currency.description: Currency identifier used in pricing layers

l2_markups.description: Layer 2 markup entries keyed by rule name

final_total.description: Final total prices through each layer

refundability.description: List of refundability options in results

totalHotelsFiltered.description: Total number of hotels after filtering

HotelSearchContent.description: Lookup content referenced by IDs in the hotel results

currencies.description: Map of currency ID to currency info

countries.description: Map of country ID to country info

cities.description: Map of city ID to city info

zones.description: Map of zone ID to zone info

chains.description: Map of chain ID to chain info

hotelTypes.description: Map of hotel type ID to hotel type info

segments.description: Map of segment ID to segment info

roomTypes.description: Map of room type ID to room type info

boards.description: Map of board ID to board info

facilities.description: Map of facility ID to facility info

facilityGroups.description: Map of facility group ID to facility group info

HotelSearchParameters.description: At least one of hotelId, zoneId, cityId or terminalCode must be provided

terminalCode.description: Terminal code identifier (0 for any). At least one of hotelId, zoneId, cityId or terminalCode must be non-zero.

rooms.description: List of rooms with occupancy details

adults.description: Number of adults in the room

children.description: Number of children in the room

ages.description: Ages of children in the room

templates.description: List of template types to include in the bundle

key.description: Base64 encoded string identifying the selected hotel rate

passengers.description: List of passengers assigned to this rate

includeInfo.description: Whether to include info in results (1 = true)

includeContent.description: Whether to include content in results (1 = true)

includeStatistics.description: Whether to include statistics in results (1 = true)

passengers.description: List of hotel passengers including one contact passenger

roomIndex.description: Index of the room this passenger is assigned to

title.description: Passenger title (1 = Mr, 2 = Mrs, 3 = Ms, 4 = Mstr, 5 = Miss)

rateKey.description: Base64 encoded rate key associated with this passenger

roomIndex.description: Index of the room this passenger is assigned to

title.description: Passenger title (1 = Mr, 2 = Mrs, 3 = Ms, 4 = Mstr, 5 = Miss)

rateKey.description: Base64 encoded rate key associated with this passenger

contact.description: Flag indicating this passenger is the contact (1 = true)

sameAsContact.description: Flag indicating this passenger details are the same as the contact (1 = true)

searchParameters.description: The reconstructed hotel search parameters for the given search ID

rooms.description: List of rooms with occupancy details

searchId.description: Search identifier to convert to search parameters

rooms.description: Map of room ID to room info

content.description: Lookup content referenced by room facilities

facilityGroups.description: List of facility groups (empty if none)

photos.description: List of room photo paths, or false if no photos available

facilities.description: List of facility identifiers for this room (empty if none)

hotels.description: List of matching hotel autocomplete results

term.description: The search term typed by the user to autocomplete

exclude.description: Identifier to exclude from autocomplete results (0 for none)

GetHotelInfoResponse.description: Hotel info response containing a single hotel and its associated content lookups

hotel.description: This upscale hotel is located close to the beach in the mesmerising city of Athens.
hotel.name: Divani Apollon Palace and Thalasso

HotelInfo.description: Static hotel information (non-availability data). Note: all numeric fields are returned as strings.

description.example: This upscale hotel is located close to the beach in the mesmerising city of Athens.

chain.description: Hotel chain identifier as a string, or null if no chain

type.description: Hotel type identifier as a string (references hotelTypes in content)

facilities.description: Map of facility ID to facility attributes

segments.description: List of segment identifiers as strings

image.description: Relative path to the main hotel image

gallery.description: List of relative paths to hotel gallery images

stars.description: Hotel star rating as a string

HotelInfoLocation.description: Hotel location. Note: all ID fields are returned as strings.

HotelInfoReview.description: Hotel review summary. Note: numeric fields are returned as strings.

reviewCount.description: Number of reviews as a string

HotelInfoFacilityAttributes.description: Attributes of a facility as returned by getHotelInfo. All values are strings. Properties vary by facility type.

indFee.description: Fee indicator ('1' = has fee, '0' = no fee)

number.description: Numeric value associated with the facility

poiName.description: Name of the point of interest

distance.description: Distance in meters as a string

currency.description: ISO currency code for the fee amount

HotelInfoContent.description: Lookup content referenced by IDs in the hotel info response

countries.description: Map of country ID to country info. Values may be null if country details are unavailable.

cities.description: Map of city ID to city info

zones.description: Map of zone ID to zone info

chains.description: List of hotel chains referenced by this hotel

hotelTypes.description: List of hotel types referenced by this hotel

segments.description: Map of segment ID to segment info

facilities.description: Map of facility ID to facility info

facilityGroups.description: Map of facility group ID to facility group info

ids.description: List of property style identifiers to retrieve. Pass an empty array to retrieve all styles.

GetPropertyStylesResponse.description: Map of property style ID (as string key) to property style object

PropertyStyle.description: A property style tag that can be associated with a hotel

GetRoomTypesResponse.description: Map of room type ID (as string key) to a map of room code to internal room ID

RoomTypeCodeMap.description: Map of room type code (e.g. 'TPL.ST') to internal room ID

types.description: List of hotel issue type identifiers

ids.description: List of group category identifiers. Pass an empty array to retrieve all.

codes.description: List of group category codes. Pass an empty array to retrieve all.

example.groupName: Incluye hoteles de 2 estrellas, standard, mini ho
example.description: Includes 2-star hotels, standard, mini hotels, residences and rural hotels.

GroupCategory.description: A group category used to classify hotels by star rating or type

groupOrder.description: Display order of the group category

groupName.description: Group category name (may be in the supplier's language)

ids.description: List of category identifiers. Pass an empty array to retrieve all.

codes.description: List of category codes. Pass an empty array to retrieve all.

HotelCategory.description: A hotel category defining its star rating, accommodation type and group

star.description: Star rating associated with this category

categoryGroup.description: Code of the group category this category belongs to (references GroupCategory.groupCode)

ids.description: List of destination identifiers. Pass an empty array to retrieve all.

cityCodes.description: List of IATA city codes. Pass an empty array to retrieve all.

GetDestinationsResponse.description: Map of destination ID (as string key) to destination object

Destination.description: A bookable destination (city) with its country information

ids.description: List of board identifiers. Pass an empty array to retrieve all.

GetBoardsResponse.description: Map of board ID (as string key) to board object

Board.description: A meal board option available for hotel bookings

ids.description: List of facility group identifiers. Pass an empty array to retrieve all.

GetFacilityGroupsResponse.description: Map of facility group ID (as string key) to facility group object

FacilityGroup.description: A group that categorises hotel facilities (e.g. Location, Facilities, Health)

ids.description: List of hotel type identifiers. Pass an empty array to retrieve all.

GetHotelTypesResponse.description: Map of hotel type ID (as string key) to hotel type object

HotelType.description: A property type classification for a hotel (e.g. Hotel, Apartment, Resort)

ids.description: List of hotel chain identifiers. Pass an empty array to retrieve all.

GetHotelChainsResponse.description: Map of hotel chain ID (as string key) to hotel chain object

HotelChain.description: A hotel chain or brand that a property may belong to

ids.description: List of facility identifiers. Pass an empty array to retrieve all.

groupIds.description: List of facility group identifiers to filter by. Pass an empty array to retrieve all groups.

GetFacilitiesResponse.description: Map of facility ID (as string key) to facility object

Facility.description: A hotel or room facility. The groupId references a FacilityGroup (e.g. groupId 7 = Room Distribution, 8 = Room Distribution Alternative).

type.description: List of transaction types to filter by (1 = Deposit, 2 = Withdraw, 3 = Payment, 4 = Refund, 5 = Agreement)

via.description: List of payment gateways to filter by (1 = Travel Tank, 2 = SharkPay, 3 = Flutterwave)

status.description: List of transaction statuses to filter by (1 = Pending, 2 = Accepted, 3 = Declined, 4 = Failed, 5 = Cancelled)

transactions.description: List of transactions matching the filter criteria

total.description: Total number of transactions matching the filter (before paging)

status.description: Transaction status (1 = Pending, 2 = Accepted, 3 = Declined, 4 = Failed, 5 = Cancelled)

type.description: Transaction type (1 = Deposit, 2 = Withdraw, 3 = Payment, 4 = Refund, 5 = Agreement)

mode.description: Payment mode (1 = Bank Transfer, 2 = Cash, 3 = Cheque, 4 = Card, 5 = Wallet, 6 = Card POS, 7 = On Hold)

via.description: Payment gateway (1 = Travel Tank, 2 = SharkPay, 3 = Flutterwave)

reconciled.description: Flag indicating whether the transaction has been reconciled (1 = true)

meta.description: List of additional metadata parameters for the transaction
